summary: Iteration 24: Pinnwand System, Dashboard Tabs, and Group Mentions Testing Complete. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend tests verified: (1) Dashboard has two tabs - Pinnwand and Dashboard, (2) Dashboard tab shows sections in correct order: Favoriten → Zuletzt angesehen → Neueste Artikel → Statistiken, (3) Schnellzugriff section removed, (4) Pinnwand tab shows empty state when no Pinnwand articles exist, (5) Categories dialog has Pinnwand-Kategorie checkbox, (6) Pinnwand badge displays on categories marked as Pinnwand, (7) Documents folder filtering works correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user. Test categories created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 features fully tested: (1) Dashboard.jsx has Tabs component with Pinnwand/Dashboard tabs, (2) Dashboard tab shows Favoriten, Zuletzt angesehen, Neueste Artikel, Statistiken in correct order - Schnellzugriff removed, (3) Categories.jsx has is_pinnwand checkbox with data-testid='pinnwand-checkbox', (4) Pinnwand badge shows on categories with is_pinnwand=true, (5) GET /api/categories/pinnwand/articles returns articles from Pinnwand categories, (6) GET /api/groups/search/mention returns groups with member_count field, (7) Documents folder filtering bug fixed - sortedDocuments useMemo now filters by selectedFolderId.

dashboard_tabs.details: Two tabs exist: Pinnwand and Dashboard. Pinnwand tab shows empty state message when no Pinnwand articles. Dashboard tab shows sections in correct order.

schnellzugriff_removed.details: Schnellzugriff section is no longer present in Dashboard.

categories_pinnwand_checkbox.details: Pinnwand-Kategorie checkbox exists in create/edit dialog with data-testid='pinnwand-checkbox'. Description text explains articles will appear on Pinnwand.

pinnwand_badge.details: Categories with is_pinnwand=true display Pinnwand badge in the category tree.

pinnwand_articles_api.details: GET /api/categories/pinnwand/articles returns list of articles from Pinnwand categories.

groups_mention_api.details: GET /api/groups/search/mention returns groups with group_id, name, description, and member_count fields.

documents_folder_filter.details: Clicking folder in Documents view correctly filters documents. Bug fix verified - sortedDocuments useMemo filters by selectedFolderId.
